howItWorks.intro: This chatbot savings calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
rules: Current Cost = (Tickets × Handle Time ÷ 60) × Hourly Rate
Tickets Deflected = Total Tickets × Deflection Rate
New Cost = Remaining Agent Cost + Bot Subscription
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.question: What is chatbot deflection rate?
faq.answer: Deflection rate is the percentage of customer inquiries fully resolved by the chatbot without human intervention. Well-implemented bots achieve 30-60% deflection on common questions.

faq.question: How much does a customer support chatbot cost?
faq.answer: Basic rule-based chatbots: $50-$200/month. AI-powered chatbots: $200-$1,000/month. Enterprise solutions: $1,000-$10,000+/month. Costs vary by volume and complexity.

faq.question: Will a chatbot replace my support team?
faq.answer: Chatbots handle routine inquiries (password resets, order tracking, FAQs), freeing agents for complex issues. Most companies reduce headcount by 20-40% while improving response times.

faq.question: Is the Chatbot Savings Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard practical calculation formulas trusted by users. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

sections.title: What Is the Chatbot Savings Calculator?
sections.body: The Chatbot Savings Calculator is a free online tool designed for users who need quick, accurate calculations in the practical calculation space. By entering your monthly support tickets, avg handle time, agent hourly rate, you get instant results including current monthly support cost, tickets deflected by bot, new monthly cost. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting current monthly support cost right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In practical calculation, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by users worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to get accurate results with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your monthly support tickets and need to find the right current monthly support cost. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Monthly Support Tickets
howToSteps.description: Start by entering your monthly support tickets — this is the primary input for the calculation.

howToSteps.title: Fill In Additional Details
howToSteps.description: Complete the remaining fields: avg handle time, agent hourly rate, bot deflection rate, chatbot monthly cost. Each value refines the calculation for greater accuracy.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your current monthly support cost, tickets deflected by bot, new monthly cost. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your monthly support tickets before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
Run the calculator with different values to compare scenarios and find the optimal approach for your situation.
Pay attention to both current monthly support cost and tickets deflected by bot — they work together to give you the full picture.
Bookmark this page for quick access next time you need to get accurate results.
If you're unsure about your chatbot monthly cost, start with a conservative estimate and adjust from there.
